title: rubus × aristicalyx
intro: Rubus × aristicalyx, also known as Himalayan Raspberry, is a hybrid species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × aristicalyx include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus × aristicalyx can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, and is also used in traditional remedies for digestive issues and as a natural dye.
